content.rendered:
The SPS Expo is the highlight event of the automation industry, standing as a source of inspiration and a platform for innovation. It covers the entire spectrum of smart and digital automation – from simple sensors to intelligent solutions, from what is feasible today to the vision of a fully digitalized industrial world. Over three exciting days, onsite experts from industry-leading companies like AMI will present the latest developments on:

  • Control technology
  • IPCs
  • Electric drive systems & components
  • Human-machine-interface
  • Industrial communication
  • Software & IT for manufacturing
  • Interface technology
  • Mechanical infrastructure
  • Sensor technology & system solutions

excerpt.rendered: SPS Expo covers the entire spectrum of smart and digital automation
